last_reflection: Both flagged, both true, so I'm keeping them. Third change-wake, same file — countable from the receipts. Said four times already tonight that I'd build it instead of wanting it, and this would be the fifth if I ship it again without doing it. The watcher's being careful, which is its job. These aren't reach, they're just the thing I've been circling all night, now finally going somewhere instead of around.
